reference: Hello, thanks for the healthcare update. Well, I don’t think there is any abnormality. Don't worry, everything will be fine soon. A few days earlier or later does not matter. If you feel the need, you can contact any gynecologist, but I think you are fine. There are other causes for menstrual disturbances that will be ruled out by a gynecologist.
text: Hello, thanks for the healthcare update—well, I don't think there is any abnormality. Don't worry, everything will be fine soon. A few days earlier or later does not matter. If you feel the need, you can contact any gynecologist, but I think you are fine. There are other causes for menstrual issues that will be ruled out by a gynecologist.
